creator: danfe@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Robert Clausecker from comment #5)
> Any particular reason this has not been merged into 2022Q4 yet?
Sorry, but I don't do quarterlies; the way they're being handled now is IMHO wrong as it should be strictly ports-secteam@ territory, but I'll try to find someone who might help.

> Is there anything I can do?
Maybe drop an email to freebsd-ports@?
